note: Curated from /hackathon-assets/happy-cake/ official asset pack. Replaced via `npm run snapshot:catalog` with live square_list_catalog.

items.name: Medovik — Honey Cake
items.description: Eight thin honey-baked layers folded with cool sour cream and finished with a soft golden crumb. Our signature, the cake the bakery is built on.
items.imageAlt: Classic Medovik honey cake with thin amber sponge layers, sour-cream filling, and golden crumb topping.

items.name: Red Velvet
items.description: Buttermilk red velvet sponge with cream cheese filling, finished with a glossy chocolate ganache drip and gold-leaf chocolate shards. The birthday cake that doesn't apologize for itself.
items.imageAlt: Naked-style layered red velvet cake with cream cheese filling and chocolate ganache drip.

items.name: Chocolate Truffle Layer
items.description: Tall chocolate sponge layered with airy white cream and finished with a dark ganache top. For when the moment calls for chocolate, not for a chocolate cake.
items.imageAlt: Cross-section of a tall chocolate sponge cake layered with airy white cream and dark ganache top.

items.name: Berry Vanilla Sponge
items.description: Light vanilla sponge layered with pastel berry buttercream and a bright fresh-berry filling. A celebration cake for spring birthdays and afternoon parties.
items.imageAlt: Slice of vanilla sponge layer cake with pastel lavender buttercream and bright berry filling.

items.name: Pineapple Vanilla Layer
items.description: Vanilla sponge layered with whipped cream and bright pineapple between every tier. Light, fruity, and cheerful — the cake we bring out when the weather turns.
items.imageAlt: Layered vanilla sponge cake with whipped cream and pineapple pieces between every tier.

items.name: Strawberry Pavlova
items.description: Crisp meringue shell, billowy whipped cream, fresh strawberries. Made the morning of pickup — meringue waits for no one.
items.imageAlt: Crisp pavlova topped with whipped cream and fresh strawberries.

items.name: Kartoshka — Cake Truffles
items.description: Hand-rolled cake-crumb truffles dusted with poppy seeds. Six pieces per box. The childhood-treat slice you take home when you can't choose a whole cake.
items.imageAlt: Hand-rolled cake-crumb truffle balls dusted with poppy seeds on a white plate.

items.name: Black Forest
items.description: Chocolate sponge with cherry compote, whipped cream, and dark chocolate curls. The classic, done patiently. Cherries are seasonal — call ahead.
items.imageAlt: Black Forest cake crowned with whipped cream rosettes, stemmed cherries, and dark chocolate curls.

items.name: Napoleon
items.description: Twelve buttery puff pastry layers with a vanilla custard our team has tuned for two years. By special order — three days lead time, please.

items.name: Carrot & Walnut
items.description: Lightly spiced carrot cake with cream cheese frosting and chopped walnuts. By request — same-day if we have walnuts on the bench, otherwise next-day.
